bucket: traffic crossings, track miles, and crash-injury tail rows

subagents.finding: Crash-injury rows are safe only with non-name injury wording; bare numeric fire/derailment rows require source-context plumbing and should remain unresolved for now.

rules: Exact traffic metric names ezpass_traffic, paid_traffic_volume, tolls_by_mail_traffic, and total_paid_traffic normalize to crossings/count only when value is a nonnegative integer and raw_value_text contains that stored count.
track_miles normalizes to track_miles/distance only when payload text outside the metric name contains track-mile wording.
crash_injuries normalizes to injuries/safety only when payload text contains injury/injured wording.
Bare numeric crash_injuries rows remain unresolved.
Composite fatality, KSI, killed, severe-injury, or severely-injured crash_injuries rows remain unresolved.

explicit_deferrals: subway_fires, subway_fires_12mo_rolling, and train_derailments bare numeric rows need source-context-aware normalization or payload enrichment before safe inference.
traffic_fatalities_and_injuries has mixed value/value_min semantics and should not be fixed by unit normalization alone.
score, date, change, and broad ridership/vacancy rows need separate policy/gates.
